title: 3D Swords
description: This Resource Pack makes the Gold, Iron, Diamond and Netherite swords 3D, making them look better in 3rd Person.
body:
This Resource Pack changes the looks of the Gold, Iron, Diamond and Netherite swords. This makes them look 3D, therefore looking better in 3rd Person. This is mainly for fun, so updates will be at my own desire.

<details>
<summary>Some stuff you could use that can make it look cool</summary>

Vanilla Tweaks has some fun stuff, and the rainbow enchant glint with the unobtrusive one works great with it. ([vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net/))

Also recommend using 3rd person model if you want the model to be in your hand and pointing out.

</details>

<details>
<summary>For old versions</summary>

v1 will no longer be updated, or I will update the models, but thats mabey going to be in a different project. If you do use v1, note that it might have some hanging lines. ;)

</details>

If you have problems, or just want to join the community, [click here for the discord server](https://discord.gg/VNFwzH6ZPW).

Yes, you can use it in your modpack, and do mention me & the download if you use it in a video.
